raw_consumer_statement:
I canceled a recurring parking service on XX/XX/XXXX before the renewal date. Despite this, the merchant charged my American Express card {$200.00} on XX/XX/XXXX ( they initially charged {$290.00} and later refunded {$99.00}, leaving a total disputed amount of {$200.00} ). I submitted documentation to Amex confirming my cancellation, as well as proof that I used a different parking facility during the disputed period, which shows I did not use the XXXX service after cancellation. 

The merchant claimed I used the service during the XX/XX/XXXX to XX/XX/XXXX period but provided no supporting evidence, such as access logs or timestamps. American Express repeatedly resolved the dispute in the merchants favor, most recently on XX/XX/XXXX, despite the evidence I provided. This dispute has now been ongoing for almost XXXX months, and I was unable to locate a clear way to submit a formal complaint or request escalation through Amex. 

I am requesting that American Express fairly review the evidence I submitted, apply recurring billing cancellation policies correctly, and reverse the {$200.00} charge.
